attractions.name: Silver Dollar City
attractions.desc: America's #1 Theme Park! Outlaw Run, Time Traveler, Powder Keg, Mystic River Falls, Fire In The Hole. 12 min drive. Summer Celebration with extended hours!

attractions.name: Copperhead Mountain Coaster
attractions.desc: Longest in Branson! Control your speed down Branson's longest coaster. Zip lines, ropes course & observation tower too.

attractions.name: Runaway Mountain Coaster
attractions.desc: Twisting mountain coaster through the Ozark hills. Control your own speed!

attractions.name: The Track Family Fun Parks
attractions.desc: Multiple tracks for all ages. Classic and high-speed go-karts, plus arcade.

attractions.name: Fritz's Adventure
attractions.desc: Massive indoor adventure park. Ropes course, climbing walls, slides, laser maze. Great rainy day activity!

attractions.name: WonderWorks
attractions.desc: Upside-down building! 100+ hands-on science exhibits, bubble lab, astronaut training, and indoor ropes.

attractions.name: Titanic Museum
attractions.desc: World's largest Titanic museum. Touch an iceberg, walk the halls, hear survivor stories.

attractions.name: Ripley's Believe It or Not!
attractions.desc: Hundreds of bizarre artifacts, interactive exhibits, and the famous Odditorium.

attractions.name: Hollywood Wax Museum
attractions.desc: Lifelike wax figures of your favorite celebrities. Great Instagram moments.

attractions.name: Aquarium at the Boardwalk
attractions.desc: Walk-through underwater tunnel. Jellyfish, sharks, stingrays, and touch pools.

attractions.name: Branson Landing
attractions.desc: Branson's premier outdoor shopping, dining and entertainment district. Waterfront boardwalk, fountain shows, and live music.

attractions.name: Dogwood Canyon Nature Park
attractions.desc: Stunning 10K-acre Ozarks canyon with walking trails, waterfalls, bison herd, and trout fishing. Tram tours available.

attractions.name: Table Rock State Park
attractions.desc: Beautiful state park on Table Rock Lake. Marina, trails, picnic areas, and swim beach.

summerTip: Buy SDC tickets online to skip the line. After 3 PM entry is discounted. Unlimited Summer Ticket: $99 for the whole season!
